title: pedicularis contorta var. ctenophora
intro: Pedicularis contorta var. ctenophora, also known as twisted lousewort, is a plant species that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae and is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Pedicularis contorta var. ctenophora include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and immune function. The plant is commonly prepared as a tincture, tea, or dried herb for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal preparations.
